/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -framework Cocoa CMakeFiles/2048.dir/Driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/2048.dir/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/2048.dir/gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/2048.dir/LTexture.cpp.o -o 2048  /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2_image.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2main.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2.dylib
